reasoning: The A1 interface is the primary source of packet loss and retransmissions, which prevents the delivery of essential policies from the Non-RT RIC to the Near-RT RIC, causing downstream performance degradation in the E2, F1-c, and F1-u interfaces and components like O-CU and O-DU.
actionable_steps: 1. Perform a physical and logical link check on the A1 interface between the Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC. 2. Inspect network congestion or MTU mismatches that could cause packet loss in the downlink direction. 3. Verify the health and configuration of the A1 policy delivery service.
